Veterans Benefits: Mississippi exempts military retirement pay from state income tax and offers disabled-veteran homestead property-tax exemptions, state employment preference, education and tuition assistance, military vehicle tags, and hunting and fishing privileges for qualifying veterans.
LGBTQSource: MAP Mississippi Equality Profile 2026; no Forest HRC MEI coverage found
Description: Small central Mississippi city near I-20 with very low housing costs, Bienville National Forest access, and a large Raytheon/RTX manufacturing site supporting radar and electronic-warfare programs. Forest offers outdoor recreation and defense-manufacturing employment nearby, but its city crime-rate proxy is high and VA specialty care is in Jackson rather than local.
